access_key_id.name: S3 Storage - Access Key ID
access_key_id.remark: Cloud storage access key identifier used for authenticated requests.

endpoint.name: S3 Storage - Endpoint
endpoint.remark: Custom service endpoint URL when not using the provider default.

force_path_style.name: S3 Storage - Force Path Style
force_path_style.remark: Whether to force path-style addressing. Allowed values: empty/false or 1/true.

path_prefix.name: S3 Storage - Path Prefix
path_prefix.remark: Optional object key prefix applied to all uploaded files.

region.name: S3 Storage - Region
region.remark: Cloud storage region code for the target bucket or container.

secret_access_key.name: S3 Storage - Secret Access Key
secret_access_key.remark: Cloud storage secret key. Leave blank or masked to keep the existing value.
